principle: Add JSON-LD structured data to every page — Google prefers it over RDFa and microdata
explanation: X.seo|json_ld: Google_officially_recommends_JSON-LD; add_script_type_application/ld+json_to_page; supported_types: Article + Product + FAQ + HowTo + LocalBusiness + Event + Recipe + Video + Breadcrumb + many_more; use_Merkle_Schema_Generator_to_create_code; test_with: Google_Structured_Data_Testing_Tool + Rich_Results_Test; NO:mixing_structured_data_formats NO:skipping_structured_data eg: "plain_page_no_schema" >> "page + JSON-LD_Organization + contactPoint + telephone"

principle: Write snippet bait as 40-50 word paragraphs under H2/H3 headings to win featured results
explanation: X.seo|snippet_bait: SEMrush_study: featured_snippets == 40-50_words; structure: target_keyword_as_H2/H3 + clear_concise_paragraph_40-50_words + images_min_1200px_wide + aspect_ratios_16x9_4x3_1x1; prerequisite: must_rank_on_first_page_first; NO:long_dense_paragraphs NO:images_without_dimensions eg: "500_word_wall_of_text_under_generic_heading" >> "H2:How_to_change_a_tire? + 45_word_step_by_step_answer + 1200px_image"

principle: Add Open Graph meta tags so shared content displays correctly on Facebook instead of plain text
explanation: X.seo|open_graph: og:type + og:description + og:title -> controls_how_page_appears_when_shared_on_Facebook; without_OG -> plain_listing_user_must_describe_manually -> fewer_clicks; safe_to_use_alongside_JSON-LD_schema; NO:skipping_og_tags eg: "shared_on_facebook_shows_random_text_snippet" >> "og:description='Wide_range_of_jackets._Free_delivery.' + shows_image_title_description"
